amendmentDate.title: AmendmentDate
amendmentDate.description: Effective start date of the amendment, to be specified in YYYY-MM-DD format. If not provided, this will default to today’s date.

assetIds.title: AssetIds
assetIds.description: The list of asset IDs to amend.

quantityChange.title: QuantityChange
quantityChange.description: The difference in quantity added or reduced from the asset's existing quantity.
